use_cases: Showcasing portfolio projects in a visually engaging grid layout
Displaying mixed media content (videos and images) with intelligent autoplay
Creating interactive gallery experiences for creative or product showcases
Building portfolio websites with lazy-loaded video content
Implementing expandable media galleries with smooth transitions
ai_summary: An interactive bento-style gallery component featuring a dynamic grid layout for displaying mixed media content (videos and images). Uses intersection observer for intelligent video autoplay when scrolled into view, with smooth Framer Motion animations and modal expansion for focused viewing. Optimized for creative portfolios, product showcases, and media-heavy landing pages.
